findings.title: httpd_ac15: No RELRO
findings.details: Binary compiled without RELRO. GOT entries are writable, enabling GOT overwrite attacks.

findings.title: httpd_ac15: No stack canary
findings.details: Binary compiled without stack canaries. Stack buffer overflows can directly overwrite return addresses.

findings.title: httpd_ac15: No PIE
findings.details: Binary is not position-independent. Base address is predictable, simplifying exploitation.

findings.title: httpd_ac20: No RELRO
findings.details: Binary compiled without RELRO. GOT entries are writable, enabling GOT overwrite attacks.

findings.title: httpd_ac20: No stack canary
findings.details: Binary compiled without stack canaries. Stack buffer overflows can directly overwrite return addresses.

findings.title: httpd_ac20: No PIE
findings.details: Binary is not position-independent. Base address is predictable, simplifying exploitation.

findings.title: httpd_ac20: High unsafe/safe function ratio (4.0)
findings.details: Dangerous functions outnumber safe alternatives 4.0:1. Dangerous=12, Safe=3.
